title: perityle scopulorum
intro: Perityle scopulorum, also known as Mountain Globe Mallow, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Perityle scopulorum include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and support immune function. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be prepared by drying the leaves and flowers, then infusing them in hot water or a solvent.
